# zendesk_support_address (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk support address (recipient address) — an email address tickets can be received at. The Zendesk API calls these recipient_addresses.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The support email address. Write-once in Zendesk: changing it forces replacement of the resource.

### Optional

- `brand_id` (Number) The id of the brand the address belongs to. If omitted, Zendesk assigns one (the default brand) and it is recorded in state.
- `name` (String) The display name of the address. If omitted, the Zendesk-assigned value is recorded in state.

### Read-Only

- `cname_status` (String) CNAME record status: unknown, verified, or failed.
- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean) Whether this is the account's default support address.
- `dns_results` (String) DNS verification results.
- `domain_verification_code` (String) Verification code for domain verification.
- `domain_verification_status` (String) Domain verification status: unknown, verified, or failed.
- `forwarding_status` (String) Forwarding status (external addresses only): unknown, waiting, verified, or failed.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `spf_status` (String) SPF record status: unknown, verified, or failed.
- `updated_at` (String)
